meaning: adj.隐遁的,寂寞的n.隐遁者,寂寞者
examples: Yes, yes, she often dwells a recluse in large cities!
His widow became a virtual recluse for the remainder of her life.
She spent the last forty years of her life as a recluse.
Because Hughes was supposed to be a recluse, Irving thought his hoax would never be discovered.
L. history, ended his life a recluse, sleeping on the floor of the Pittsburgh Amtrak station.
